hero.title: We create websites that make money for
hero.subtitle: We do more than build a website. We make sure clients actually find you: Google rankings, Google Business Profile and Maps, plus the analytics that prove it works. We serve Szczecin, Goleniów, Stargard and Nowogard.

about.title: I create websites that
about.subtitle: Hi, I'm Alex! I'm 19 years old and a programming school graduate. For me, programming is more than just writing code - it's a real sales tool.
about.description1: I don't use sluggish templates (like WordPress). I build from scratch using a powerful tech stack (including React and TypeScript) so your website is unbeatably fast and drives profits.
about.description2: A website is an investment in your company's growth. I believe in simple rules, transparency, and a partnership free of confusing tech jargon.

location.title: Local collaboration
location.description: I operate in the areas of Szczecin, Goleniów, Nowogard, and Stargard. I'm happy to meet in person to discuss your project.

quality.title: Uncompromising quality
quality.description: I code using the latest technologies (Vite, Supabase, Tailwind, Vercel). You are guaranteed security and reliability.

approach.title: Tailored approach
approach.description: No rigid pricing. You get a fast, free quote and a dedicated solution tailored to your budget.

projects.title: Projects that drive business
projects.subtitle: See the websites we've created to help companies get more clients from Google search.

problem.title: A website alone
problem.subtitle: A website is a shop, and visibility in Google is the street it stands on. You can own the best premises in town, but built in the middle of nowhere it will not bring you a single client.

stats.label: of all Google searches are local
stats.note: Clients in your area search Google every single day.

stats.label: of people searching locally on a phone contact a business within 24 hours
stats.note: Visibility turns into a phone call almost immediately.

stats.label: of users ever visit the second page of Google results
stats.note: If you are not on page one, you practically do not exist.

calculator.title: What is invisibility costing you?
calculator.intro: Move the sliders and enter your own numbers. The result is money that currently goes to your competitors.
calculator.valueLabel: How much do you earn per client?

without: A client searches for your service and sees your competition
The website exists, but nobody visits it
Your business is missing from Maps, so the phone stays silent
Nobody knows what works, because nothing is measured
with: You show up when a client searches for your service nearby
The website actually works and collects inquiries
Your business appears on Google Maps and clients call you
You know exactly where clients come from and what pays off
problem.conclusion: That is why we do not stop at the website. We handle everything that makes clients find you.

services.title: Not just a website, but
services.subtitle: Three areas that together bring in clients.

pillars.title: Visibility
pillars.description: Local SEO and your Google Business Profile make sure you are seen at all.

pillars.title: Website
pillars.description: The tool that converts visits into contact and builds your brand's status.

pillars.title: Data
pillars.description: Search Console and Analytics show where your clients actually come from.

list.title: Local SEO and rankings
list.description: We make your business appear in Google when a client searches for your service nearby. We optimize the site for the algorithms from the first line of code, improve loading speed (Core Web Vitals) and semantics to outpace the competition.

list.title: Google Business Profile and Maps
list.description: We set up and optimize your Google Business Profile so the company shows on Maps and in local results. It is the fastest route to calls from nearby clients, often faster than the website itself.

list.title: Analytics and Search Console
list.description: We connect Google Analytics and Search Console so you know exactly where clients come from, which keywords they find you on and what actually works. Without it, SEO is guesswork.

list.title: Google Ads campaigns
list.description: When you need clients right now, we launch paid campaigns. They bring traffic from day one and complement SEO, which works over the long run.

list.title: Business and landing pages
list.description: Fast, single-page sites built to maximize conversions and collect inquiries. Ideal for a start, an event promotion, or a single service. No unnecessary code, lightning-fast loading.

list.title: Content Management Systems (CMS)
list.description: Custom-designed platforms with an intuitive admin panel. You manage texts, add blog articles and photos without any programming knowledge. Regular content is fuel for SEO.

list.title: Website redesign
list.description: Has your website stopped selling or is it too slow on mobile? We run a technical audit, propose a new UX/UI layout and rewrite it in modern technologies while maintaining your Google rankings.

list.title: Advanced web applications
list.description: We go beyond standard websites. We create custom applications with login, databases and third-party integrations (API), such as dedicated client portals or booking systems.

services.contactPrompt: Not sure where to start, or need a custom quote?

included.title: You always get
included.subtitle: We do not split visibility into packages. SEO, your Google Business Profile and analytics are part of every project, because without them a website simply does not work. Only the scope of the site itself differs.
included.fomo: Every month without these is clients going to somebody else. That is why we do not sell them separately or hide them behind a pricier package.
included.fomoHighlight: Your competitors have had this for a long time.
always: SEO optimization for your city and industry
Google Business Profile and presence on Maps
optional: Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns
Ongoing care and monthly visibility reports
included.note: Every project is priced individually, because a simple business card site is a different job than a portal with a CMS and campaigns. Tell us what you need and we will prepare a concrete quote.

forWho.title: Who is this offer for?
forWho.subtitle: Collaboration Diagnostics
forWho.heading: Let's see if we are a
forWho.desc: I don't aim to work with everyone. I engage in projects treated as an investment in business growth, where quality is a priority, not an addition.
forWho.goodFitTitle: We are a good fit if:

goodFit.title: The website should earn money
goodFit.description: You treat your website as a sales tool. You expect a return on investment and a professional online image.

goodFit.title: Business partnership
goodFit.description: You are looking for a partner, not an 'executor'. You have time for a short conversation to jointly outline the strategy.

goodFit.title: Investment in quality
goodFit.description: You understand that a good application costs money, but thanks to speed and usability, it pays for itself.

forWho.badFitTitle: We are NOT a good fit if:

badFit.title: What is the cheapest?
badFit.description: You only care about finding the cheapest option on the market for 100$, regardless of quality and sales.

badFit.title: Project 'for yesterday'
badFit.description: You expect immediate results 'off hand'. You don't have time for a preliminary analysis of your company.

badFit.title: Website 'just to be there'
badFit.description: You are not interested in acquiring new clients from the internet. You are just looking for a dead business card.

steps.title: Analysis and Goals
steps.desc: We start with a no-obligation conversation, live or online. We check how your visibility in Google looks today, who holds the top positions for your keywords and what your clients are searching for. Together we define the business goals. This is a solid foundation without which we do not start working.

steps.title: Concept and Wireframes
steps.desc: I translate our arrangements into the first visualizations before writing a line of code. Step by step, I explain the proposed solutions and check if they fit your vision. At this stage, we discuss and make corrections until the project is 100% in line with your expectations.

steps.title: Development & Optimization
steps.desc: This is where the magic happens. We turn approved designs into a fully functional website using the latest technologies. From the first line of code we build it for Google's algorithms: semantic HTML, structured data, loading speed (Core Web Vitals) and perfect display on mobile devices.

steps.title: Quality Control
steps.desc: Before we show the site to the world, it goes through rigorous testing. We check performance across browsers, test forms and verify the display on every resolution. We also confirm that Google correctly sees and indexes all subpages. You receive a fully working version for final approval.

steps.title: Publication and Support
steps.desc: We publish the site, and only now the real work on visibility begins. We submit the site to Google Search Console, connect Analytics, and set up and optimize your Google Business Profile so the company appears on Maps. Our role does not end here: we help with operations, monitor rankings and grow your visibility in the months that follow.

testimonials.title: What my clients say?
testimonials.subtitle: Proof that the process really works.

items.question: What is the difference between a website and SEO?
items.answer: The website is the place a client lands on. SEO is how they get there in the first place. You can have a great site, but if it does not appear in Google, nobody will ever see it. That is why we treat both as one job and do not sell them separately.

items.question: How much does a website with Google visibility cost?
items.answer: Our project budgets usually range from 1500 to 5000 PLN. The final amount depends on scope: a simple business card site costs less than a platform with a CMS, blog or campaigns. SEO optimization, your Google Business Profile and analytics are included in every project, you do not pay extra for them. You get an exact, free quote before we start.

items.question: How quickly will I see results in Google?
items.answer: Your Google Business Profile and Maps can bring the first calls within a few weeks. Organic SEO takes longer: first movements are usually visible after 1-3 months, while real positions on competitive keywords build over six months and beyond. If you need clients immediately, we add Google Ads campaigns.

items.question: Do you handle Google Business Profile and Maps?
items.answer: Yes, it is one of the pillars of our work. We create or take over your Google Business Profile, complete it, optimize categories and description, and set everything so the company shows in local results and on Maps. For service businesses in smaller towns this is often a faster source of clients than the website itself.

items.question: Will I be able to edit the content myself?
items.answer: Yes, if you choose a site with a content management system (CMS). You can update texts, replace photos and add blog posts without any programming knowledge. Regularly added content additionally strengthens your SEO.

items.question: Is this a one-off service or ongoing cooperation?
items.answer: Building the site along with SEO, Google Business Profile and analytics setup is billed once. Visibility in Google is a process though, so many clients stay with us longer so we can watch rankings, develop content and report results. It is not mandatory, and the scope of that care is agreed individually.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: A simple business card site is usually 7-14 days. An extensive platform with a CMS and multiple subpages takes 3 to 5 weeks. Search Console, Analytics and Google Business Profile setup happen during deployment. We agree the exact schedule before starting.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: We do not use slow builders with a thousand plugins. We code from scratch in a modern stack: Vite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and Supabase. As a result the sites load instantly, which Google rewards in search results, and they are secure.

burgerszczecin.title: Burger Gastropub
burgerszczecin.description: An atmospheric gastropub website with signature burgers, a craft beer menu, and a simple table booking system.
burgerszczecin.overviewTitle: The atmosphere of the place, moved online
overview: The gastropub had a loyal crowd on site but barely existed online. The old website did not work properly on phones, and booking a table required a call during opening hours, which cut off younger guests.

We built a lightweight site that captures the mood of the place and leads guests straight to a booking. The food and craft beer menus can be browsed one-handed on a phone, and a table is booked without any page reload.

features.title: Booking at any hour
features.description: Guests reserve a table even after closing time, without waiting for someone to pick up the phone.

features.title: A menu built for thumbs
features.description: Food and craft beer menus readable on a phone without zooming or sideways scrolling.

features.title: Visibility in search
features.description: Optimization for local restaurant keywords plus a Google Business Profile with an up-to-date menu.

features.title: Character instead of a template
features.description: A dark, moody design matched to the venue's interior rather than an off-the-shelf theme.

nova-ubezpieczenia.title: Insurance Agency
nova-ubezpieczenia.description: A clear website for a multi-agency insurance broker with a readable policy offer and a quick contact form.
overview: The agency offered more than a dozen types of policies, but visitors drowned in industry jargon and had no idea where to start. Inquiries came in rarely and at random.

We organized the offer into clear sections and rewrote it in language clients actually use. The path from landing to sending an inquiry shrank to a few clicks, and the form collects exactly what is needed to price a policy.

features.title: An offer without jargon
features.description: Policy types described in the client's language, with a clear note on who each one is for.

features.title: A short path to contact
features.description: A quick inquiry form available from every section, with no unnecessary fields.

features.title: Trust at first glance
features.description: A calm, orderly design that builds credibility in the financial sector.

features.title: Local visibility
features.description: Optimization for regional insurance keywords and a configured Google Business Profile.

results: Better visibility in local search results

nord-car.title: Car Service
nord-car.description: A website for a car workshop with a description of diagnostic services and a convenient module for booking a service appointment.
nord-car.overviewTitle: A workshop that takes bookings around the clock
overview: The workshop barely existed online, and repair slots could only be booked by phone during working hours. Drivers searching for a garage in the evening ended up with the competition.

We built a lightning-fast site with a module for booking a specific slot. The driver describes the fault and picks a convenient day at any hour, and the workshop starts the morning with a ready list of requests.

features.title: Bookings after hours
features.description: Slots reserved in the evening and at weekends, when drivers actually look for a garage.

features.title: Services explained clearly
features.description: Diagnostics and repairs described so the driver knows what to expect.

features.title: Built for speed
features.description: Lightweight code and optimized images, so the site loads instantly even on a weak connection.

features.title: Presence on Maps
features.description: A Google Business Profile with hours and directions, because drivers search on the move.

results: A professional online image for the workshop

meblex.title: Furniture Showroom
meblex.description: An elegant furniture showroom website with a gallery of arrangements and an offer of made-to-measure upholstered furniture.
meblex.overviewTitle: Made-to-measure furniture shown like in a showroom
overview: The showroom makes upholstered furniture to order, so every conversation started by explaining options, materials and how the ordering process works. Without an online portfolio, quoting ate up a huge amount of time.
We prepared an extensive, categorized gallery of arrangements plus sections explaining materials and finishes. Clients now arrive already informed, and the conversation starts with specifics.

features.title: A categorized gallery
features.description: Arrangements grouped so clients quickly find exactly what they are looking for.

features.title: Materials explained visually
features.description: Sections presenting fabrics and finishes that previously had to be explained in every conversation.

features.title: A shorter path to a quote
features.description: An inquiry form linked to the specific piece from the gallery.

features.title: Photography first
features.description: Optimized but high-quality photos, because in furniture the visual impression decides.

results: A clear presentation of made-to-measure furniture
